data.queryValue:
WITH
-- 0) Параметры
list_p AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN regexp_replace($$ {{geo_list}} $$, 'E''|''|\(|\)|\s', '', 'g') = ''
        THEN NULL
      ELSE string_to_array(
             regexp_replace($$ {{geo_list}} $$, 'E''|''|\(|\)|\s', '', 'g'),
             ','
           )::text[]
    END AS geo_arr,
    CASE
      WHEN regexp_replace($$ {{utm_list}} $$, 'E''|''|\(|\)|\s', '', 'g') = ''
        THEN NULL
      ELSE string_to_array(
             regexp_replace($$ {{utm_list}} $$, 'E''|''|\(|\)|\s', '', 'g'),
             ','
           )::text[]
    END AS utm_arr
),
param_p AS (
  SELECT COALESCE({{date_book_interval}}, 0)::int AS book_window_days
),

/* 0a) ПЕРВАЯ СДЕЛКА (create) по клиенту и её utmsource */
first_deal_rows AS (
  SELECT
    cp.person_key,
    l.crm_id,
    l.creation_date_time::timestamp AS first_deal_dt,
    NULLIF(trim(l.utmsource), '')   AS utmsource
  FROM mart.parent_child_leads l
  JOIN v_person_key cp
    ON cp.account_id      = l.account_id
   AND cp.contacts_amo_id = l.contacts_amo_id
  WHERE l.creation_date_time IS NOT NULL
),
first_deal_global AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (fdr.person_key)
         fdr.person_key,
         fdr.first_deal_dt,
         COALESCE(fdr.utmsource, 'unknown') AS first_deal_utmsource,
         fdr.crm_id                          AS first_deal_crm_id
  FROM first_deal_rows fdr
  ORDER BY fdr.person_key, fdr.first_deal_dt, fdr.crm_id
),

-- 1) Покупки отчётного набора (GEO + интервал) из матвью + мягкий фильтр по UTM ПЕРВОЙ сделки
report_pp AS (
  SELECT
    v.person_key,
    v.crm_id,
    v.booking_date,
    v.deal_amount,
    v.revenue,
    v.geo,
    v.prev_booking_date
  FROM v_person_purchases_prev v
  LEFT JOIN first_deal_global fdg USING (person_key)
  CROSS JOIN list_p lp
  WHERE v.geo IN ('ОАЭ','Москва','Грузия','Таиланд','Бали','Таиланд Eng')       -- базовый набор
    AND (lp.geo_arr IS NULL OR v.geo = ANY(lp.geo_arr))                          -- мультиселектор GEO
    AND (lp.utm_arr IS NULL OR fdg.first_deal_utmsource = ANY(lp.utm_arr))       -- мультиселектор UTM (по 1-й СДЕЛКЕ)
    AND v.booking_date >= {{interval_from}}::date
    AND v.booking_date <  {{interval_to}}::date
),

-- 2) Люди в отчёте
persons_in_scope AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT person_key FROM report_pp
),

-- 3) Глобальные старты сессий (по людям отчёта) и их границы
episodes_global_scoped AS (
  SELECT
    v.person_key,
    v.booking_date AS episode_start
  FROM v_person_purchases_prev v
  JOIN persons_in_scope s USING (person_key)
  WHERE v.prev_booking_date IS NULL
     OR (v.booking_date - v.prev_booking_date) >
        ((SELECT book_window_days::text FROM param_p) || ' days')::interval
),
episodes_bounds_scoped AS (
  SELECT
    eg.person_key,
    eg.episode_start,
    LEAD(eg.episode_start) OVER (PARTITION BY eg.person_key ORDER BY eg.episode_start) AS next_episode_start
  FROM episodes_global_scoped eg
),

-- 4) Первая покупка человека в интервале
min_interval_purchase AS (
  SELECT person_key, MIN(booking_date) AS min_interval_booking_date
  FROM report_pp
  GROUP BY person_key
),

-- 5) Последняя покупка ДО первой в интервале (глобально)
prev_global_before AS (
  SELECT
    mip.person_key,
    MAX(v.booking_date) AS prev_before
  FROM min_interval_purchase mip
  JOIN v_person_purchases_prev v
    ON v.person_key = mip.person_key
   AND v.booking_date < mip.min_interval_booking_date
  GROUP BY mip.person_key
),

-- 6) Сколько сессий началось ВНУТРИ интервала и реально содержит покупку выбранного GEO
sessions_in_interval_geo AS (
  SELECT
    eb.person_key,
    COUNT(DISTINCT eb.episode_start) AS cnt_sessions_in_interval
  FROM episodes_bounds_scoped eb
  WHERE eb.episode_start >= {{interval_from}}::date
    AND eb.episode_start <  {{interval_to}}::date
    AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM report_pp r
      WHERE r.person_key = eb.person_key
        AND r.booking_date >= eb.episode_start
        AND (eb.next_episode_start IS NULL OR r.booking_date < eb.next_episode_start)
    )
  GROUP BY eb.person_key
),

-- 7) Группа клиента
person_group AS (
  SELECT
    p.person_key,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(sig.cnt_sessions_in_interval, 0) >= 2 THEN 'Повторная покупка'
      WHEN pgb.prev_before IS NOT NULL
           AND (mip.min_interval_booking_date - pgb.prev_before) >
               ((SELECT book_window_days::text FROM param_p) || ' days')::interval
        THEN 'Повторная покупка'
      ELSE 'Одна покупка'
    END AS purchase_group
  FROM persons_in_scope p
  LEFT JOIN min_interval_purchase    mip USING (person_key)
  LEFT JOIN prev_global_before      pgb USING (person_key)
  LEFT JOIN sessions_in_interval_geo sig USING (person_key)
),

-- 8) Первая покупка в интервале по человеку → contacts_amo_id, account_id
first_pp_row AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (r.person_key)
         r.person_key,
         r.crm_id,
         r.booking_date
  FROM report_pp r
  ORDER BY r.person_key, r.booking_date, r.crm_id
),
person_ids AS (
  SELECT
    f.person_key,
    MIN(p.account_id)      AS account_id,
    MIN(p.contacts_amo_id) AS contacts_amo_id
  FROM first_pp_row f
  JOIN mart.parent_child_leads p
    ON p.crm_id = f.crm_id
  GROUP BY f.person_key
),

-- 9) Первая БРОНЬ (первая покупка) в жизни клиента — атрибут
first_booking_global AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (v.person_key)
         v.person_key,
         v.booking_date::date AS first_booking_date
  FROM v_person_purchases_prev v
  ORDER BY v.person_key, v.booking_date, v.crm_id
),

-- 10) Агрегации по клиенту (в выбранных GEO + интервале)
per_client AS (
  SELECT
    r.person_key,
    COUNT(*)                                        AS bookings_total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.geo = 'ОАЭ')           AS bookings_oae,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.geo = 'Москва')        AS bookings_moscow,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.geo = 'Таиланд')       AS bookings_thailand,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.geo = 'Бали')          AS bookings_bali,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.geo = 'Грузия')        AS bookings_georgia,
    SUM(r.deal_amount)                              AS total_deal_amount,
    STRING_AGG(r.crm_id::text, ', ' ORDER BY r.booking_date, r.crm_id) AS crm_ids,
    STRING_AGG(
      TO_CHAR(r.booking_date, 'DD.MM.YYYY')
      || ' (' ||
      COALESCE(((r.booking_date::date - r.prev_booking_date::date))::text, '—')
      || ')',
      ', '
      ORDER BY r.booking_date, r.crm_id
    ) AS booking_dates_with_gaps
  FROM report_pp r
  GROUP BY r.person_key
)

-- 11) Итоговая выборка
SELECT
  pid.contacts_amo_id                      AS "ID контакта",
  pid.account_id                           AS account_id,
  pg.purchase_group                        AS "Группа клиентов",
  pc.bookings_total                        AS "Количество брони",
  pc.bookings_oae                          AS "Брони ОАЭ",
  pc.bookings_moscow                       AS "Брони Москва",
  pc.bookings_thailand                     AS "Брони Таиланд",
  pc.bookings_bali                         AS "Брони Бали",
  pc.bookings_georgia                      AS "Брони Грузия",
  pc.total_deal_amount                     AS "Сумма сделок контакта",
  pc.crm_ids                               AS "CRM ID броней",
  pc.booking_dates_with_gaps               AS "Даты всех брони",
  -- Источник/CRM первой СДЕЛКИ
  fdg.first_deal_utmsource                 AS "Источник первой сделки",
  fdg.first_deal_crm_id                    AS "CRM ID первой сделки",
  fdg.first_deal_dt                        AS "Дата первой сделки",
  -- Первая БРОНЬ (покупка)
  fbg.first_booking_date                   AS "Дата первой брони (глобально)"
FROM per_client             AS pc
JOIN person_group           AS pg  ON pg.person_key = pc.person_key
LEFT JOIN person_ids        AS pid ON pid.person_key = pc.person_key
LEFT JOIN first_deal_global AS fdg ON fdg.person_key = pc.person_key
LEFT JOIN first_booking_global AS fbg ON fbg.person_key = pc.person_key
ORDER BY pc.bookings_total DESC, pid.contacts_amo_id NULLS LAST
